artPrompt: An ornate hero shot of a pair of weighted carnival dice tumbling in extreme foreshortened close-up, blank pip-faces gleaming hot gold, an unnatural cyan-red shimmer warping inside them where the weight hides. Smoky black void cradles them while distant striped tents and neon glow blur behind; ember sparks orbit the dice mid-roll, sinister and gleaming, rendered as a bold painted graphic-novel splash — strong silhouettes, heavy directional inking and dramatic shadow shapes, fully painted (not flat cel comic).
name: Loaded Dice of the Carnival
text:
Whenever you roll one or more dice, you may add 1 to or subtract 1 from one of the results. (The dice are weighted. Don't ask toward what.)
{1}, {T}: Roll a six-sided die.
flavorText: They roll a six about as often as the Mayor wins a fair election: always.

extras.dice: fudge any of your die results
